languages.text: На заставе обнаружен список ожидаемых подкреплений. Судя по нему, давно ожидается подкрепление рода Гапрак.

traits.locale_text: На заставе обнаружен список ожидаемых подкреплений. Судя по нему, давно ожидается подкрепление рода Гапрак.

languages.text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.
languages.original_text: На заставе обнаружен список ожидаемых подкреплений. Судя по нему, давно ожидается подкрепление рода Гапрак.

traits.locale_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

languages.text: Im Außenposten wurde eine Liste der erwarteten Verstärkungen gefunden. Laut der Liste sind die Truppen der Gaprak längst überfällig.
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

traits.locale_text: Im Außenposten wurde eine Liste der erwarteten Verstärkungen gefunden. Laut der Liste sind die Truppen der Gaprak längst überfällig.

languages.text: Une liste des renforts attendus a été découverte à l'avant-poste. D'après elle, les renforts de la maison Gaprak devaient arriver il y a bien longtemps.
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

traits.locale_text: Une liste des renforts attendus a été découverte à l'avant-poste. D'après elle, les renforts de la maison Gaprak devaient arriver il y a bien longtemps.

languages.text: 在前哨发现了一份预计援军名单。根据名单所述，贾帕克的援军本该早已抵达。
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

traits.locale_text: 在前哨发现了一份预计援军名单。根据名单所述，贾帕克的援军本该早已抵达。

languages.text: Se ha hallado una lista de los refuerzos previstos en el puesto avanzado. A juzgar por su contenido, los refuerzos de los Gaprak deberían haber llegado hace mucho.
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

traits.locale_text: Se ha hallado una lista de los refuerzos previstos en el puesto avanzado. A juzgar por su contenido, los refuerzos de los Gaprak deberían haber llegado hace mucho.

languages.text: 前哨基地で援軍予定者のリストが見つかった。それによると、ガプラック一家の援軍は以前から期待されていたようだ。
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements was found at the outpost. According to the list, reinforcements of the Gaprak family have been expected for a long time.

languages.text: Karakolda beklenen takviyelerin bir listesi bulundu. Buna göre Gaprak takviyeleri uzun zamandır bekleniyormuş.
languages.original_text: A list of expected reinforcements has been found at the outpost. According to it, the Gaprak reinforcements have been long awaited.

traits.locale_text: Karakolda beklenen takviyelerin bir listesi bulundu. Buna göre Gaprak takviyeleri uzun zamandır bekleniyormuş.
